content:
**Continuous/subscription security attestation and monitoring for AI agents (runtime, posture management, signed evidence) sees strong demand in 2026, driven by buyer expectations for ongoing proof rather than point-in-time audits, plus regulatory needs (e.g., SOC 2, EU AI Act, HIPAA).** Tools emphasize real-time enforcement, audit trails, and re-issuable signed reports, aligning closely with weekly deploys by Series A AI startups.[[1]](https://www.vanta.com/resources/best-trust-center-software)[[2]](https://x.com/Cyphrexio/status/2062913585022673354)

### Concrete Market Pricing and Tiers (2026)
Public pricing is limited (most enterprise tools are custom/quote-only), but available tiers include:

- **Cyphrex** (AI agent-specific: blockchain SSN/identity, behavioral enforcement, spend limits, PII detection, cryptographically signed compliance reports/exportable audit trails for SOC 2/EU AI Act/etc., real-time monitoring):[[3]](https://cyphrex.io/pricing)[[4]](https://cyphrex.io/docs)
  - Starter: Free (3 agents, 10K checks/mo, limited logs).
  - Startup: $49/mo (10 agents, 500K checks, 90-day logs, basic reports).
  - Scale: $199/mo (50 agents, 5M checks, 1-year logs, included reports).
  - Verify+: $599/mo (200 agents, 5M checks, 3-year logs, 50 signed reports/mo; $49 per extra report; PDF/JSON exports).
  - Enterprise: Custom (unlimited, dedicated support, contracted reporting).

  This directly matches "continuous agent-security monitoring that re-issues a signed evidence report on every deploy," with self-custody logs and on-demand exports.

- **Vanta** (continuous control monitoring, automated evidence collection, 1,300+ hourly tests, compliance automation; strong for SOC 2/ISO/etc.; increasingly AI/agent-focused):[[5]](https://www.secureleap.tech/blog/vanta-review-pricing-top-alternatives-for-compliance-automation)[[6]](https://www.complyjet.com/blog/vanta-iso-27001-2026)[[7]](https://www.trycomp.ai/vanta-pricing)
  - Core/Essentials (startups, 1 framework): ~$10,000–$20,000/year (~$833–$1,667/mo).
  - Plus/Growth: $15,000–$50,000/year.
  - Scale/Enterprise: $30,000–$80,000+/year (or higher with add-ons like TPRM, Trust Center).
  - Implied average revenue per customer: ~$19K ARR (as of early 2026).[[8]](https://sacra.com/c/vanta/)

- **Lakera** (AI-native runtime security, prompt injection/guardrails, real-time threat detection): Free Community tier (limited requests, e.g., 10K/mo); Enterprise custom (contact sales).[[9]](https://www.eesel.ai/blog/lakera-pricing)

- **HiddenLayer** (AI Security Platform: runtime monitoring/AIDR, model scanning, adversarial testing, posture management; agentic support): Custom; one AWS Marketplace listing shows extreme enterprise pricing (e.g., $5M for 12-month full platform access). Focus is on continuous runtime visibility.[[10]](https://aws.amazon.com/marketplace/pp/prodview-2haypjrayfxgw)

- **Wiz AI-SPM** (AI Security Posture Management: continuous inventory, risk prioritization, supply chain, shadow AI detection): Part of broader Wiz platform; custom/enterprise pricing (Wiz generally scales with cloud footprint; no public small-team tiers disclosed).[[11]](https://www.wiz.io/solutions/ai-spm)

Other notes: One-time or point-in-time security audits can run $20K+ (or far higher for full SOC 2 Type II, cited at $35K–$250K with 6–18 month timelines).[[2]](https://x.com/Cyphrexio/status/2062913585022673354) Broader security tooling stacks (e.g., Snyk + Datadog + etc.) have been reported in the $4K–$14K+/mo range before optimization.[[12]](https://x.com/brankopetric00/status/1989621034715103587)

### What a Series A AI Startup Shipping Weekly Would Pay (MRR Estimate)
A typical Series A AI startup (small team, rapid iteration, needing buyer-trust signals like signed evidence on deploys) would likely target the **$200–$2,000/mo range** for fit-for-purpose continuous monitoring:
- **Lower end (~$200–$600/mo)**: Cyphrex Scale or Verify+ tiers—affordable, agent-specific, with exactly the signed/report-on-demand capability for frequent deploys. Startup tier ($49/mo) as a starting point for lighter needs.[[3]](https://cyphrex.io/pricing)
- **Mid/upper end (~$800–$2,000+/mo)**: Vanta Core/Plus equivalent for broader GRC + continuous monitoring, especially if pursuing formal certifications buyers demand. Higher if multiple frameworks or add-ons.[[5]](https://www.secureleap.tech/blog/vanta-review-pricing-top-alternatives-for-compliance-automation)

They would prioritize tools offering low-friction integration, exportable evidence, and scalability with agent volume rather than full enterprise suites. Custom quotes for Lakera/HiddenLayer/Wiz would likely start higher or target later-stage/enterprise deals.

### Subscription/Recurring vs. One-Time Audits
**Recurring subscriptions are strongly preferred by both buyers and (implicitly) investors**:
- Buyers demand "proof of ongoing security, not just annual audit reports" due to rising third-party risks, regulations, and AI/agent dynamism. Continuous monitoring replaces point-in-time audits; real-time visibility builds trust and enables faster sales cycles (e.g., Trust Centers with live data).[[1]](https://www.vanta.com/resources/best-trust-center-software)
- Cyphrex and similar tools position themselves as shortcuts to the expensive, slow traditional SOC 2 path, delivering day-one audit trails and on-demand signed reports.[[2]](https://x.com/Cyphrexio/status/2062913585022673354)
- Vanta and peers market continuous control monitoring as the modern standard, with AI enhancements for predictive/noncompliance alerts.[[13]](https://www.vanta.com/collection/grc/continuous-control-monitoring)
- Investors favor scalable, recurring revenue models (high retention, predictable MRR/ARR) over lumpy one-time audit fees. Tools like Vanta demonstrate strong ARR growth via continuous offerings.[[8]](https://sacra.com/c/vanta/)

One-time audits remain relevant for initial certifications but are insufficient alone for ongoing buyer assurance or weekly-shipping AI agents. Hybrid approaches (continuous monitoring + periodic formal audits) are common.

**X handles/quotes** (examples from recent discussions): @Cyphrexio (promotes signed reports and contrasts vs. $35K–$250K traditional costs); broader security cost threads highlight consolidation to control spend.[[2]](https://x.com/Cyphrexio/status/2062913585022673354)[[12]](https://x.com/brankopetric00/status/1989621034715103587)

Data is from 2025–2026 sources; exact quotes often require sales calls, and pricing can vary by usage/agents/frameworks. Demand is rising with agentic AI adoption.
